name: Spaghetti Alla Salsa Cruda
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the tomatoes and cut into small pieces.
2. Drain in a colander.
3. In a large saucepan with 7 pints (6L) of salted water, cook spaghetti al dente.
4. Drain the cooked spaghetti in a colander.
5. In a serving bowl, combine the tomatoes, basil, garlic, parsley and a little oil.
6. Add the hot pasta to the bowl and mix gently until all ingredients are well combined.
7. Add more oil, salt, and plenty of pepper. Stir gently again.
8. Serve at room temperature.
